title: AGRICULTURAL COMMODITY DEALER
doc_html:
CHAPTER 21.  AGRICULTURAL COMMODITY DEALER

AND WAREHOUSE LAW

§3401.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the Agricultural Commodity Dealer and Warehouse Law.

Added by Acts 1982, No. 563, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1983.

CHAPTER 21.  AGRICULTURAL COMMODITY DEALER
AND WAREHOUSE LAW
§3401.  Short title
This Chapter may be cited as the Agricultural Commodity Dealer and Warehouse Law.
